case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. SHANE GELDBACH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2017 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-09-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
